headline: The Impact of War and a Proposed Merger Hurt Estee Lauder Companies (EL) in Q1
summary: Hardman Johnston Global Advisors, an investment management firm, issued its investor letter for the Hardman Johnston Large Cap Equity Strategy for the first quarter of 2026. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The strategy achieved a return of 0.68% (gross) and 0.57% (net) during this period, in contrast to a -4.33% return […]
